texto: The secret of successfully giving yourself away lies not so much in calculated actions as in cultivating friendly, warm-hearted impulses. You have to train yourself to obey giving impulses on the instant -- before they get a chance to cool. When you give impulsively, something happens inside of you that makes you glow, sometimes for hours.
explicacao: Orientação direta de David Dunn sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. A afirmação “The secret of successfully giving yourself away lies not so much in calculated actions as in cult…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, giving, yourself, útil em momentos de dia-chuvoso e termino.
